item.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Filerz maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 1, 04:30 - 06:30 UTC

Jun 25, 09:24 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our MX Plan Filerz.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 01/07/2026 04:30 UTC
End time : 01/07/2026 06:30 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Logs Cluster120 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 25, 08:00 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering on the Cluster120.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 25/06/2026 07:25 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Logs on Cluster120 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers cannot view logs on https://logs.cluster120.hosting.ovh.net
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident to fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz1016 Cluster120 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 25, 07:55 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issues on the Filerz1016 Cluster120.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 25/06/2026 07:15 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz1016 is unreachable on Web Hosting Cluster120.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on the specified Filerz.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster 106 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 24, 14:14 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 24/06/2026 10:00 UTC
End time : 24/06/2026 11:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 24, 12:03 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 24/06/2026 11:30 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 24/06/2026 10:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Slowness on Cluster 106.
Customers Impact : Some customers hosted on Cluster 106 may face slowness.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 24, 11:02 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary latency issues on the Cluster 106 in GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 24/06/2026 10:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Slowness on Cluster 106.
Customers Impact : Some customers hosted on Cluster 106 may face slowness.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][VoIP] - Softcall Maintenance notification
item.description:
Jun 23, 23:25 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our VoIP is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

Jun 23, 21:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 23, 11:38 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our VoIP offer.

Start time : 23/06/2026 21:00 UTC
End time : 24/06/2026 22:10 UTC
Service impact : Provisioning for the Softcall service may experience temporary disruptions during maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our VoIP infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Mailboxes maintenance notification
item.description:
Jun 23, 18:52 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 9, 20:15 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 9, 20:13 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Collaborative solutions offer.

Start time : 09/06/2026 18:15 UTC
End time : 23/06/2026 18:15 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Collaborative solutions infrastructure to all our mailbox solutions.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster100 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 23, 12:21 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 23/06/2026 06:30 UTC
End time : 23/06/2026 08:25 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 23, 09:05 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 23/06/2026 08:25 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 23/06/2026 07:52 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster100 was temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers hosted on Cluster100 were unable to access their websites.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 23, 08:01 UTC
Identified - We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue on the Cluster100 in GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 23/06/2026 07:52 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster100 is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers hosted on Cluster100 may currently be unable to access their websites.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 23/06/2026 06:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster100 was temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers hosted on Cluster100 were unable to access their websites.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 23, 06:43 UTC

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 23/06/2026 06:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster100 is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers hosted on Cluster100 may currently be unable to access their websites.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Domains] - Domains Name incident notification on .MS
item.description:
Jun 17, 07:03 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our .MS Domains offering has been resolved.

Start time : 16/06/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 17/06/2026 07:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by our provider.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 16, 08:34 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our .MS Domains offer, customers in the impacted zone are unable to perform some tasks on .MS domains.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 16/06/2026 08:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .MS domains.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform specified operations on .MS domains.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilized to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Zimbra Maintenance Notification
item.description:
Jun 16, 23:26 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 16, 20:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 12, 13:09 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Zimbra offer.

Start time : 16/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 16/06/2026 23:00 UTC
Service impact : Each customer will be temporarily unable to send, receive emails and access their Zimbra mailbox for 10 minutes during the operation.
Please note that emails received during the 10 minutes impact will be stored and delivered after the time of impact.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Zimbra servers.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Clusters 103/105/106/107/110 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
Jun 15, 23:41 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 15, 04:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 4, 20:21 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer on clusters 103/105/106/107/110 in GRA region.

Start time : 15/06/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 16/06/2026 21:50 UTC

List of concerned Filerz:

15/06/26 22:00 UTC:
- filerz350 cluster105
- filerz390 cluster107
- filerz654 cluster110
- filerz742 cluster106
- filerz875 cluster103
- filerz877 cluster103

16/06/26 06:00 UTC
- filerz393 cluster107
- filerz657 cluster110
- filerz743 cluster106
- filerz745 cluster106
- filerz879 cluster103
- filerz880 cluster103

16/06/26 22:00 UTC
- filerz394 cluster107
- filerz663 cluster110
- filerz746 cluster106
- filerz747 cluster106
- filerz881 cluster103
- filerz882 cluster103

Service impact : We will be migrating the various Filerz servers to keep our infrastructure up to date and more stable, thereby preventing further service interruptions. The Filerz servers will be unavailable for 30 minutes on the scheduled migration date.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on the Web Hosting infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

Impacted Service(s) : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .TL domains.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform specified operations on .TL domains.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilized to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
